{"primary_mode":"layout","declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","secondary_modes":["summaries"],"rationale":"The optimization curve has flattened, which suggests the current constant-width residual stack is the main bottleneck rather than another small scalar tweak. A stagewise residual layout with downsampling and channel expansion is the highest-leverage next move while staying within the same training harness.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","old":"class CIFAR10Net(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        super().__init__()
        channels = BASE_CHANNELS
        bias = not USE_BATCHNORM
        stem_layers: list[nn.Module] = [nn.Conv2d(INPUT_CHANNELS, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias)]
        if USE_BATCHNORM:
            stem_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm2d(channels))
        stem_layers.append(nn.ReLU(inplace=True))
        self.stem = nn.Sequential(*stem_layers)
        blocks: list[nn.Module] = [
            nn.Conv2d(channels, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(channels) if USE_BATCHNORM else nn.Identity(),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        ]
        blocks.extend(
            ResidualBlock(channels, dropout=DROPOUT_RATE, use_bn=USE_BATCHNORM)
            for _ in range(DEPTH)
        )
        self.blocks = nn.Sequential(*blocks)
        self.pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 1))
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Flatten(),
            nn.Linear(channels, FC_HIDDEN),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(DROPOUT_RATE),
            nn.Linear(FC_HIDDEN, NUM_CLASSES),
        )

    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = self.stem(x)
        x = self.blocks(x)
        x = self.pool(x)
        return self.classifier(x)","new":"class CIFAR10Net(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        super().__init__()
        stem_channels = BASE_CHANNELS
        stage2_channels = BASE_CHANNELS * CHANNEL_MULT
        bias = not USE_BATCHNORM

        stem_layers: list[nn.Module] = [nn.Conv2d(INPUT_CHANNELS, stem_channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias)]
        if USE_BATCHNORM:
            stem_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm2d(stem_channels))
        stem_layers.append(nn.ReLU(inplace=True))
        self.stem = nn.Sequential(*stem_layers)

        self.stage1 = self._make_stage(stem_channels, DEPTH, bias)

        downsample_layers: list[nn.Module] = [
            nn.Conv2d(stem_channels, stage2_channels, 3, stride=2, padding=1, bias=bias),
        ]
        if USE_BATCHNORM:
            downsample_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm2d(stage2_channels))
        downsample_layers.append(nn.ReLU(inplace=True))
        self.downsample = nn.Sequential(*downsample_layers)

        self.stage2 = self._make_stage(stage2_channels, max(1, DEPTH - 1), bias)
        self.pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 1))
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Flatten(),
            nn.Linear(stage2_channels, FC_HIDDEN),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(DROPOUT_RATE),
            nn.Linear(FC_HIDDEN, NUM_CLASSES),
        )

    def _make_stage(self, channels: int, depth: int, bias: bool) -> nn.Sequential:
        return nn.Sequential(
            *[
                ResidualBlock(channels, dropout=DROPOUT_RATE, use_bn=USE_BATCHNORM)
                for _ in range(depth)
            ]
        )

    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = self.stem(x)
        x = self.stage1(x)
        x = self.downsample(x)
        x = self.stage2(x)
        x = self.pool(x)
        return self.classifier(x)","anchor":"","function":"","text":"","source":""}]}
